user_query: I just noticed Day 2 has no breakfast, my first meeting is at 9am and I'll be starving. Add a quick hotel breakfast before the meeting.

fields.name: Hotel Breakfast
fields.description: Quick breakfast at the hotel buffet to start the day with a variety of options including continental and hot breakfast items.

insertion_point.reasoning: The user needs breakfast before the 9:00 AM meeting. Inserting at position 0 ensures breakfast is scheduled before any other activities on Day 2.
